calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):
Heather Stoneman, Esq., for and with Donna Moisant, Administrator.

At the court's query, Ms. Stoneman offers a report as to why the court's order was not followed regarding the unauthorized distributions. The court and counsel discussed the issue of petitioner's request for reimbursement under doctrine of equitable distribution. Upon conclusion of discussion, the court advises that it will take the preceding into consideration but that it intends to reduce the amount requested. No objection to the court's tentative ruling is presented.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross. C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Continued To Feb-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Oct-30-2023 Continued To Dec-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Continued To Oct-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Continued To Sep-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Heather Stoneman appearing via zoom for Donna Moisant (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the property located on 1084-1086 Geneva Ave. in San Francisco, that there are $377,000.00 assets in Charles Schwab account, and that any reimbursement for contributions made by Mrs. Moisant must be by an amendment to the petition. Petition for first and final report of administration etc., is continued to September 25, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
